data.title: Samsara beats Q3 earnings, stock dips as revenue outlook falls slightly short of expectations.
data.description: Samsara's stock experienced a decrease following the release of their third-quarter earnings, which exceeded expectations. However, their revenue guidance for the future was only slightly higher than anticipated. The company's positive earnings news was overshadowed by the less impressive revenue outlook.

data.title: Rubrik stock surged after beating Q3 earnings, following September plunge, despite low guidance.
data.description: Rubrik's stock experienced a significant increase following the release of its fiscal Q3 financial results, which surpassed expectations. This positive development came after the company's shares experienced a sharp decline in September due to disappointing guidance. The upbeat news of Rubrik's Q3 earnings beat amidst previously low expectations was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: FGIC gets approval from NYSDFS for CPP upward adjustment from 64.50% to 66.00% for permitted policy claims.
data.description: New York-based Financial Guaranty Insurance Company (FGIC) revealed today that the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYSDFS) has given the green light for an increase in the cash payment percentage of permitted policy claims required to be paid under the First Amended Plan of Rehabilitation for FGIC. The CPP has been upped from 64.50% to 66.00%, as per the terms set on June 4, 2013. This change will come into effect on December __, marking a positive development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Chinese bank tokenizes $600M in yuan bonds, sold to digital yuan holders. Bond backed by CBDC developed by China.
data.description: A bond was sold to holders of the digital yuan, a form of central bank digital currency (CBDC) created by the Chinese government.

data.title: Ex-CEO of Binance.US unveils stablecoin platform pre-L1 network launch, with $20M seed funding for 1Money.
data.description: Following a successful acquisition of $20 million in seed funding in January, Brian Shroder has revealed a move towards 1Money's envisioned stablecoin network.

data.title: Basal Cell Carcinoma Market to grow steadily 2025-2034 with novel drug approvals, expanding patient pool.
data.description: There is predicted growth in the basal cell carcinoma market, as existing drugs are being more widely adopted and new therapies like Remetinostat (Medvir), STP705 (Sirnaomics), SP-002 (Stamford Pharmaceuticals), and LTX-315/VP-315 (Lytix are set to enter the market. This positive shift is expected to impact the market significantly, with increasing uptake of these treatments.

data.title: Johnson Fistel is investigating Soleno Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SLNO) for violations of securities laws.
data.description: In San Diego on December 4, 2025, a shareholder rights law firm, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, is currently looking into potential violations of federal securities laws by Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO) or some of its executives. The investigation is centered around allegations of false or deceptive statements and/or the failure to comply with securities laws. The firm is delving into this matter to ensure transparency and accountability.

data.title: HBCU Green Fund & youth-led Sustainable Africa Futures Network connect 18 countries at COP30; launch Power of 10 campaign.
data.description: In December 2025, the HBCU Green Fund, also known as The Green Fund, collaborated with the youth-led Sustainable Africa Futures Network to organize a significant side event at the United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP30). This event brought together participants from 18 different countries.

data.title: Samsara (NYSE: IOT) reports Q3 earnings of 15 cents/share, beating analyst estimate of 12 cents. Revenue reaches $415.98 million, surpassing Street estimate of $398.47 million. Stock remains flat in extended trading.
data.description: Samsara, Inc.'s (NYSE: IOT) stock showed minimal change in after-hours trading following the release of its third-quarter earnings report. The report revealed earnings of 15 cents per share, surpassing the expected 12 cents per share. Additionally, the company reported quarterly revenue of $415.98 million, exceeding the estimated $398.47 million. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals grants 39,250 share options to 5 new employees on Dec 4, 2025, as inducements for joining.
data.description: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Vancouver and Boston, revealed on December 4, 2025, that it has granted equity awards to five new non-officer employees. The grants include a total of 39,250 share options. These inducement grants were officially authorized by the Compensation Committee of the company's Board of Directors. The options were provided as a way to attract these employees to join the company and are considered significant inducements in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Law firm investigating Sealed Air board for fiduciary duty breaches in sale to CD&R - Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: The law firm Johnson Fistel, PLLP, specializing in shareholder rights, has begun looking into potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the board members of Sealed Air Corporation (NYSE: SEE). This investigation pertains to the company's planned acquisition by CD&R. The news was announced on December 4, 2025, in San Diego.

data.title: Investigation on Ardent Health, Inc. (NYSE: ARDT) for possible securities law violations after stock drop.
data.description: In San Diego on December 4, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm, is conducting an investigation into potential violations of federal securities laws by Ardent Health, Inc. (NYSE: ARDT) and some of its officers and directors. The investigation is focused on determining if false or misleading statements were made, or if there was a failure to disclose certain information.

data.title: Mercury Carpet & Flooring celebrates 55 years in business, emphasizing quality flooring and customer satisfaction in Jacksonville.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Mercury Carpet & Flooring is marking a significant milestone as they celebrate their 55th anniversary. The company is reiterating its dedication to providing top-notch flooring options and ensuring customer contentment. This long-standing business, based in Jacksonville, looks forward to continuing their legacy of quality service.
TIME Magazine’s 2024 survey asked Americans what it takes to be rich. The answer: $2.5 million. breaks it down for us

data.title: Used jet and turboprop aircraft prices stagnant, but inventory drops over 15% from last year on Sandhills Global platforms.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, on December 4, 2025, the latest aviation market reports from Sandhills Global were released. These reports include data from November for various types of aircraft such as used jets, piston-single aircraft, turboprop aircraft, and Robinson piston helicopters. The information is available on Controller.com and other Sandhills platforms. The reports indicate a stagnant trend in the market, with key insights on the sales and listings of these aircraft.

data.title: University of Phoenix introduces fixed tuition and "Know Your Tuition Cost Upfront" campaign for working adult learners.
data.description: The University of Phoenix has launched a new campaign, "Know Your Tuition Cost Upfront," to increase transparency in college costs for adult learners. By offering fixed tuition rates, the university aims to provide students with more predictability in their expenses. This initiative, announced on December 4, 2025 in Phoenix, is part of the university's efforts to support working adults in pursuing higher education. The campaign's goal is to make the costs clearer for students, with the university's commitment to providing a transparent and predictable tuition structure.

data.title: MEDIROM Mother Labs collaborates with TD SYNNEX to boost exposure of "MOTHER Bracelet" and "REMONY" nationally.
data.description: Today in Tokyo, healthcare company MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) disclosed that its subsidiary, MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., has partnered with TD SYNNEX K.K. in a distributor agreement. This agreement represents a significant step for MEDIROM in expanding its health-tech solutions through MOTHER Labs.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates Semrush shareholders' rights following Adobe's $12 buyout offer, potential breach of fiduciary duties.
data.description: In San Diego on December 4, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm, initiated a probe to determine if the board members of Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SEMR) violated their fiduciary responsibilities. This investigation is related to the proposed acquisition of Semrush Holdings, Inc. by Adobe, Inc.

data.title: Faraday Future showcases FX Super One and FF 91 2.0 across UAE's Seven Emirates for 54th National Day, expanding in Middle East.
data.description: In light of Faraday Future's expansion in the Middle East, celebratory events are being organized to promote its vision for a cutting-edge electric mobility ecosystem. The expansion is a significant step towards establishing a strong presence in the region and furthering the company's commitment to innovative transportation solutions. As part of the celebration, various events and initiatives will highlight Faraday Future's dedication to intelligent electric mobility. The expansion effort aims to reach a wider audience and grow the brand's influence in the Middle East market.
